title: Linux SSH Tunneling Detected
description: Detects SSH tunneling and port forwarding commands used for pivoting, data exfiltration, or bypassing network security controls.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*ssh -L*' or msg like '*ssh -R*' or msg like '*ssh -D*' or msg like '*ssh -N -f*' or msg like '*autossh*')))
